hfa7df6c4g5a9ag4347g88a2g3b7f035c5811: My time is short, rider. We must speak.
h9e64bd0bg6987g49bfgba34g38ceaccfcea8: Were I not merciful, I would slice the skin clean from your meat.
h0907d9d6g51e4g41ecg92a6gfb3f2f9e2c9b: Yet you are not bleeding. For I am nothing if not merciful.
hb056ace3g485ag4067ga4afg183978f6a43a: A ghaik vessel has fallen from the sky, Lae'zel. Thieves aboard have taken a weapon most precious.
hc8013e8eg754cg4b26g8d96g6a01c26ff240: It is polyhedric in shape, and inscripted with the sacred runes of our people.
ha0d9a809gd968g4e7ega1f6g1fbe46ee169f: Take word to your crèche. You are to join our search.
hf7a65cedg0e44g4355gb23agd0648e71beab: Speak up, child. Affirm your mandate.
h7673f502g039cg427eg83aegafb1a43c76a4: Kith'rak, I seek purification. I have been infected aboard a ghaik vessel.
hc9ee5585g6c9dg44b8ga28fg3202a60577bf: Purification? Oh, Lae'zel - why must the truth be so bitter? Soon, your skin will go grey, and your blood will run silver. You will shed your skin to become ghaik.
hb5a0e74eg396ag4a9cg9a5cg4869d1cc34b6: Only in death are the infected cleansed.
hcbf11f0bg1b36g42f0gb1e1g7906789b89a8: Baretha - see that her skull is split and the tadpole crushed, on Vlaakith's command.
h6410eabeg5533g410fga7e2gca8af6c4cdbc: She must carry the weapon - you must keep it safe. I will take word to the others; our quest is at an end.
h6d43101agd950g48ccg8242g739822302402: Purification? Why must the truth be so bitter, young one? Soon, your skin will go grey, and your blood will run silver. You will shed your skin to become ghaik.
h7c3b1209g17ecg4030gbc69gbf4fc3fd9a8e: I do not hail from this land, but from Crèche K'liir.
h52216b53g5535g4e38g9bebgb5012c3ae0ce: Crèche K'liir? You are far from the Tears, Lae'zel. Does the caretaker let you stray so far?
h5f42b5e7gfbc3g4680g945egcbf038b1e3f7: I've come to fulfil my final test: collecting a mind flayer's head.
h98ea0a0aga832g4097g9ba0gc6151cf544d5: Then your test is delayed - your Queen issues a new command.
h87a47ad8g3ec4g4a5cgb6cfg1efd94ebb128: Take your slaves, and hunt those who escaped the ghaik ship. Find the weapon, and return it here, to the sarth.
hd9e72315ge9abg4f52g9281g0c51b01b6405: Vlaakith will see you rewarded in this plane and ours.
h7704f610g18b3g40a4ga3fcga0cbba78ea87: Kith'rak, I seek purification. I have been infected aboard a ghaik vessel.
hc9c7df05g707bg4462gb507g284777cf8f59: Hunt those who escaped the ghaik ship. Find the weapon, and return it here, to the sarth.
hc2e4039ag8511g4e35g9cd2g2fbfd6c0afbf: You test my temper, young one. Now tell me your purpose, while you can still breathe.
hb0be4ab5g0071g4962ga4ecg47fd4d0bb1d0: My crèche has asked me to learn of local customs.
h43ffc76bgd634g46d4g8a21g4bb0355401c5: Then your mission is delayed - your Queen issues a new command.
h4a3dc0b7gd91dg4ad4g9b52ga1632e7af3a1: Crèche K'liir? You are far from the Tears. Does your caretaker let you stray so far?
h90f616dcg37c1g4391ga02dg859b716dec1b: I will deliver the message as you command.
h7153e617g6e6ag4ab3g9cc0ga8b6efa1910a: You serve your Queen well, child. Take your slaves, and hunt those who escaped the ghaik ship. They must carry the weapon.
hfb541f71g3e54g46fdg8090ga16759c3c492: Vlaakith will see your faith rewarded in this plane and ours.
h57625be3g0494g4ffdg97c4g46593bfa2893: You serve your Queen well, child. Hunt those who escaped the ghaik ship. Find the weapon.
h76290c9bg930bg48a0gae43g21af1ad0fdfe: Sweet child. Your lies sting. Has Vlaakith not demanded better?
h01f19e49g3abcg4d14gab3cge5f2de0cdeec: The truth, Lae'zel, before you stretch my mercies thin.
h27ce5153g1bf2g463egaff5g059bfe5c60f2: The truth, before you stretch my mercies thin.
hdc35e9d1g837bg441bgbdbdg081a04b8b1fb: The search proves tiresome. Would that the local crèche might bear the burden.
h7e9134dage531g433dg916eg8bc7848d63e4: *The knight's mind remains closed to you.*
hd84fadc3g69f0g4a1ega1e5g3f19fafa9f82: You must rest, kith'rak. My caretaker will be keen to ease your duties.
hdba18767gc56eg4a5dg93a1g7dd66fb3bc1f: Enough. I've been infected aboard a ghaik vessel and require purification.
h4724ad81g5c15g4d4dga676gdc1831fcb1ac: Purification? Oh, child - why must the truth be so bitter? Soon, your skin will go grey, and your blood will run silver. You will shed your skin to become ghaik.
h31e99a1dg286eg4a48g80b5g251772a55dcf: Only in death are the infected cleansed.
h646dd480gbe67g49f2gb85bgcffcd4482727: Your silence is a dagger in Vlaakith's heart.

hf0a90e03g7ee1g4c53gb79dgc17880218405: Quickly read the meaning of his gestures.
hf5a650bag79d7g405eg982bg574c44aae61d: *You realise he is casting Detect Thoughts.*
ha17001fcg33b6g4ef1g9df0g0fed83535238: You close yourself to me, child? Such delightful hubris. The nation is stronger for it.

h044fc4ebg4e49g4a4dga081gbb373dfcb59b: Take word to your crèche. You are to join our search.
h39b0b9dbg1e14g4611gb4b3ga36ef92d8cc4: You cannot stay silent, child. Affirm your mandate.
h89155291gc966g467fg9103g43113230773d: My mind is my own, kith'rak. I will have your head!
h7467b037gc18eg4f4fg81a8gf0900497206f: *The gestures mean nothing to you - some sort of spell that you don't recognise.*

hbf750213g95cbg43a9gacfbg0753bbda17de: Enough games. You will die by my hand!

h86b12344gdbc3g4aeagbb28g8f47720ee53c: Yet you are not bleeding. For I am nothing if not merciful.

h0017809fgc659g4dbbga434gd31b8f3fbd42: Chk. My mandate - honoured Kith'rak - is to locate this crèche. I was infected aboard a ghaik ship and need to be purified. Your mandate is to aid me.
hd28fa442g13aeg411cgaeaegfbf1f90566d7: Purified? Oh, Lae'zel - why must the truth be so bitter? Soon, your skin will go grey, and your blood will run silver. You will shed your skin to become ghaik.
h8a075491g2649g46e5gbc66g1be57d0bcbbb: Only in death are the infected cleansed.
h5a91050bg8df5g454fgac10gd8c72cb91c3c: You will give us the weapon. Then you will bend your head for the sword.
had162105gd422g4a22gbd65gb2d0fe2d67a0: Stand down, knight. I do not have what you seek!
hb3a06ff0gea1ag4a4cg9f50g1ade34f41246: Baretha, see her skull split and her corpse examined, on Vlaakith's command. I will take word to the others - our quest has ended.
